{{Infobox artifact
| name = Seishen Kingdom armor
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The armor of the [[Seishen Kingdom]] is more advanced than [[Skysworn armor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seishen]] armor contains [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] used the [[Seishen]] armor as inspiration for his impact shield.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
